metadata.description: PPT Master skill — AI generates natively editable PPTX from any document (fork with uv venv support)

plugins.name: ppt-master
plugins.description: Generate natively editable PPTX from PDF / DOCX / URL / Markdown — real DrawingML shapes, text boxes, charts, and animations. Requires Python dependencies — run `uv venv .venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt` from the skill directory before first use.
